draft_text: How is NIMH research addressing this critical topic?
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Explore clinical trials about autism Share outreach materials about autism Find help and support What is autism spectrum disorder?
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Research shows that access to needed services and supports early in life can promote people’s health and well-being over the long term.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: We’re supporting research to better understand the full range of symptoms that people with autism may experience.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: We’re also supporting research to find better ways to meet the individual needs of people with autism.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: This includes research to improve early autism screening so that children with autism can be connected with appropriate services and supports as early as possible.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: This also includes research on supporting people with autism as they age, from childhood to adolescence and throughout adulthood.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: NIMH supports the Autism Centers of Excellence Program , an NIH-wide initiative funding large-scale, multidisciplinary studies on autism spectrum disorder.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: Find help and support Learn how to find help for yourself or someone else.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.

draft_text: You can also find support and locate mental health services in your area on the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration website.
rationale: Extracted from remote_autism-spectrum-disorders-asd_82e2d623206c.html and tagged for variants review.
